title: Doflamingo Locks the Country Down
description: Pages 6–10 focus on doflamingo locks the country down, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Usopp, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo traps Dressrosa inside the Birdcage and turns the entire kingdom into a survival game with bounties on his enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hold it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A giant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll just borrow him, if you don't mind.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Ahhhh!! Usoland!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hm? Are you lot dwarfs?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You fought for us until you ended up like this....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: From what I hear, some of those toys had been cursed for ten whole years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I can scarcely imagine their pain. If you had not come...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It hurts... stop moving me........!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: We would surely have bend an eternity in those bodies, serving as slaves....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I feel I owe you my life....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Look closely, my fellow Warriors !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This man is the hero who broke our curse!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: His name...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...Is Captain UsOP!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Guooo- hhhh!! Thank you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: guaaahhhh!! What the?! the ceiling just collapsed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: There's Light Coming from above!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Ehhhhh?!! Do you mean to say this man...was sent from Heaven itself?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Is this a miracle we are witness- ing right now....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Another one,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: How Divine ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: ...Let me down!! Leave me alone!! D'you think I want to be held up here Sali- Vating like a moron while blood pours from my veins?! What is this, an execution?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: "Let me lead you.... to saliva- Tion"....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: You real- lly are an angel from heaven...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: No, a Messiah ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Please, guide us!! What should we do now?!! Tell us, God usopp!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: *Pant*... *Pant*....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: th... then...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Des- Troy... the factory behind you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: ..and save my small friends...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: As you wish!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: uso- Land!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: dam- MIT...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's not straw hat at all!! How dare he eat that fruit...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: The Mera Mera No mi was meant to be mine...!! Damn that man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Ughh!! What am I going to tell Dofi?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: What the...?!! who are all these men?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Of course...!! The toys from under- ground!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Ain't this a little harsh of you, super- Senpai?!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: I mean, yeah, I can make barriers, but still!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I had no idea there was a place like this under- ground......

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Ah....!! who in the world are you?! where did the other Lucy go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Whoa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: That was a surprise!! Controlling this is kind of tricky!

summary: Doflamingo Locks the Country Down develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Usopp, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
